members.headline: Daily team sales training rotating through five components (intro, discovery, offer, objections, looping) keeps scripts sharp and team aligned
Daily morning role-play by sales stage keeps team sharp and identifies weak spots
Daily group role-play by script stage keeps entire team sharp without requiring individual coaching
Daily training cadence ensures team says things the right way and has memorized the script
SaaS requires 7+ years zero profit; existing business with margins/cashflow is better foundation.
Slowest initial growth, highest required capital, but infinite scale and stickiest potential revenue of all models
Adding software alone does not create SaaS company or higher valuation.
Hire for delivery/execution first, not sales; frees you to do promotion (marketing/deal flow), which drives revenue growth
By freeing delivery time and hiring for it, owner can focus 100% on promotion (sales/marketing)—growing deal flow, which is the real business lever
Unless shipping is competitive advantage, outsource 3PL; redeploy founder and team to sales/marketing.
You control your own intelligence by controlling how often you fail to adapt to conditions.
Maximize feedback frequency for accelerated learning
Start cringe, get feedback, iterate, improve
All learning is additive; winners extract lessons from failures and improve behavior
Solve problems by trying many different approaches; if one doesn't work, it's not that it's unsolvable but that you weren't skilled enough.
Weekly and quarterly wins require consistent daily execution
Controlled environment with 3-4 full practice run-throughs; practiced hand movements, camera positioning, and signaling for live performance.
Focus is like beating addiction: not a one-time victory, but daily vigilance
Be ready for the fat pitch by practicing fundamentals daily before opportunity arrives
Soft pitch: free savings assessment revealing payroll savings potential in 60 days
Webinar pitch: soft offer for free 'savings assessment' showing what client saves on payroll
Leverage Upwork with strategic pricing and language alignment for effective client acquisition
Upwork Sign-Ups as a Method to Secure Initial Freelance Clients
Optimize Upwork Profiles with Strategic Title, Portfolio, Location, and Cover Letter
Don't get stuck at base of mountain deciding route; commit to one path for 18 months minimum
Perfect plans fail when you hit reality; just start and adjust.
Operate normally until you have actual information that compels pivot.
Spend 4 weeks researching and planning, then minimal editing; don't spend 4 weeks editing.
Minimum content cadence: 1-3 posts per week on 1 platform for lead nurture; at least 2-3 weeks of activity visible so you don't look abandoned
Do cold outreach + baseline content together; content is not top-of-funnel but lead nurture—makes you look alive so prospects trust when they check your profile
When prospect gets your outreach email, first action is checking your social profile; if last post is May and it's August, you look dead/illegitimate
Bottom 50% has 14x less wealth than top 20%; pricing should reflect actual willingness to pay.
20% of customers have majority of wealth. Price at 4 tiers with 5-10x gaps; expect 20% takeup per step up.
20% of customers create 80% of profit; within that 20%, 4% create 64% of profit; profit distribution is far more extreme than wealth distribution.
Price in 5-10X jumps per tier; each new tier should represent 20% of prior tier volume and double total revenue; four-tier model captures entire market.
When a behavior change costs you virtually nothing but benefits someone else significantly, the trade is worth making; only refuse if the benefit to them is not greater than the cost to you
Frame donation as helping employees/staff, not corporate profit; triggers reciprocity.
Value = helping others get what they want
Promise meaningful help and deliver until customer is satisfied.
Existing culture around 'competitive greatness' allowed team to rally without spin-up; culture determines event quality, not logistics.
Culture is the rules (if-then) that govern reinforcement; codify by chunking 100+ rules into 3 values.
Optimize Google Business Pages for Better Visibility and Reviews
Optimize Google My Business Listings for Better Visibility and Local Reach
Partner with someone who has investor audience; pay them to introduce.
Four main ways to reach investors: affiliate, paid ads, content, or outbound.
Content strategy: regularly create content to attract accredited investors interested in your sector.
Target accredited investors with your background and track record.
Fix current state first (increase Texas share of pie), then fix pie size (dominate Texas), then expand—order matters because first two require least complexity and highest certainty
Three states (besides Texas) would theoretically work for this remedy due to wage protection laws, but none generate same revenue potential as Texas—better to dominate one than expand across many
